name: fields_smoke
description: Verify field tools end-to-end: add a spherical field, bake it to a vmap on a 17x17 plane, assert the resulting weights have the radial pattern (high near center, lower at edges).

args.script:
import c4d
from c4d import utils
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['FieldPlane', 'TestSphericalField']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
pg = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Oplane)
pg[c4d.PRIM_PLANE_WIDTH] = 400
pg[c4d.PRIM_PLANE_HEIGHT] = 400
pg[c4d.PRIM_PLANE_SUBW] = 16
pg[c4d.PRIM_PLANE_SUBH] = 16
doc.InsertObject(pg)
res = utils.SendModelingCommand(c4d.MCOMMAND_MAKEEDITABLE, [pg], doc=doc)
p = res[0]
p.SetName('FieldPlane')
doc.InsertObject(p)
c4d.EventAdd()
print(f'plane built, points={p.GetPointCount()}')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['FieldPlane', 'TestSphericalField']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
